hero_product_name: the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS electric wheelchair from the white-background reference photos
campaign_goal: Repair pass for failed AnyWell Jean-inspired Meta ads with softer, less prominent human framing while preserving outdoor freedom and trust-led close.
target_audience: Heavy-set or plus-size American seniors age 60+, their spouses, and adult children buying mobility support for loved ones.
core_selling_points:
- now $599, reg. $999
- 500W dual motors for grass and gentle slopes
- 22-inch first-class wide seat
- supports up to 330 lbs
- folds in seconds for the trunk
use_scenarios:
- backyard path near trees
- quiet sunset lane near home
visual_style: Realistic, warm, outdoor, sales-driven, portrait-first American lifestyle advertising with strong product readability.
style_tone: persuasive, warm, calm, dignified, practical, never clinical
consistency_anchor: Match the real YS16-1 PLUS wheelchair from the white-background product photos while keeping it only in normal open riding position. Preserve the right-side joystick, wide seat feel, frame, footrest, wheel layout, and real product silhouette. In every shot, keep the rider and wheelchair proportion close to c1 and c2: the rider naturally fills the broad seat, the chair reads substantial and premium, and neither subject looks oversized or undersized relative to the other.
additional_info: Repair pass: avoid prominent face-forward portrait framing. Keep faces soft, secondary, and partially in profile. Favor medium-wide shots, lower-third human placement, and environmental negative space. No direct address to camera, no close portrait hero faces, and no emotionally intense face-led framing. Preserve the outdoor freedom theme and post-overlay space for trust, price, and financing.
music: Warm restrained cinematic underscore with light piano and a subtle modern pulse.

concepts.title: Nature Feels Close Again
concepts.core_theme: A husband returns to the backyard path while his wife follows with relief and warmth.
concepts.main_theme: Nature should not feel out of reach.
concepts.hook: Nature should not feel out of reach.
concepts.cta: Shop the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS now.
concepts.visual_style: Warm morning backyard path near trees, spouse nearby, emotional but sales-ready.
concepts.continuity_rider_anchor: Keep the same heavy-set American senior husband age 60+ and the same wife across all three shots. He should visibly fill the wide seat naturally, with chair scale and framing similar to c1 and c2.
concepts.use_scenarios:
- doorway to yard path
- tree-lined backyard route
- quiet trust close
concepts.additional_info: Reuse scenes one and two. For scene three, avoid direct smiles to camera. Keep both people smaller in frame, with soft side profiles and attention directed outward toward the trees.

shots.scene_description: A heavy-set white-haired American senior man in his 60s begins to drive the YS16-1 PLUS from a generic back doorway toward a yard path while his wife follows with a relieved smile. The framing should feel like c1 and c2: medium-wide, the rider and chair dominate the portrait frame, the wide seat clearly supports his body, and the wheelchair looks full-sized and premium rather than tiny. Leave clean upper-left or upper-right negative space for floating UI such as $599 and Nature should not feel out of reach.
shots.camera_movement: smooth front-side push from doorway toward the yard, calm and steady
shots.lighting: soft morning daylight with warm highlights and natural depth
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide composition, rider and chair large in frame, generic home details only, no exact source-house cues
shots.transition_anchor: end with the chair rolling forward toward the trees
shots.voiceover_en: Nature should not feel out of reach.
shots.key_message: The outdoors can begin right at home.
shots.sfx: soft wheel roll, birds, and light morning ambience

shots.scene_description: The same husband glides smoothly along a generic tree-lined backyard path with his right hand clearly on the joystick while his wife walks a step behind, smiling. Keep the framing close to c1 and c2: the rider visibly fills the 22-inch seat naturally, thighs supported, torso proportionate to the backrest, and the chair remains large and balanced in frame. Reserve clean space for overlays like 500W Dual Motors, 22-inch First-Class Seat, and Supports Up To 330 LBS.
shots.camera_movement: steady joystick-side front-profile tracking shot with subtle forward drift
shots.lighting: clean daylight filtered through trees with premium but realistic contrast
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium shot with rider and chair taking most of the frame height, simple path and trees, spouse softly visible
shots.transition_anchor: end with a calm smile and steady forward motion
shots.voiceover_en: With a wide twenty-two inch seat and smooth five-hundred watt dual motors, getting outside feels easy again.
shots.key_message: Comfort and power become visible proof.
shots.sfx: smooth motor ambience, leaves, and light outdoor air

shots.scene_description: The husband and wife pause near the backyard tree line and look outward rather than into camera. Keep them in the lower third of the frame with soft side profiles, a calm still moment, and plenty of open sky or foliage space for a semi-transparent end-card overlay with $599 sale price, FDA 510(k) Cleared, 30-Day Risk-Free Trial, 14-Day FREE Return Shipping, and PayPal financing starting at $32.27 per month or as low as 0% APR. The couple should feel warm and anonymous, never face-led or portrait-like.
shots.camera_movement: gentle settle into a medium-wide profile hold with no direct eye contact to camera
shots.lighting: warm flattering light with soft rim light and realistic outdoor depth
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide composition, couple smaller in frame, chair still readable, open negative space above and beside them
shots.transition_anchor: end on a quiet still frame for the close
shots.voiceover_en: Now just five ninety-nine, with FDA-cleared safety, free returns, and easy PayPal financing.
shots.key_message: Trust and price close the sale.
shots.sfx: music lift and soft outdoor ambience

concepts.title: One More Sunset Together
concepts.core_theme: A steady ride makes room for one more evening outdoors together.
concepts.main_theme: Let them chase the sunset safely, one more time.
concepts.hook: Let them chase the sunset safely, one more time.
concepts.cta: Shop the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS sale now.
concepts.visual_style: Golden-hour lane near home, quiet evening path, spouse walking beside.
concepts.continuity_rider_anchor: Keep the same heavy-set American senior husband and the same wife across all three shots. Use c1 and c2 scale logic so he looks securely supported and the chair reads premium and full-size.
concepts.use_scenarios:
- driveway edge at sunset
- tree-lined lane
- warm end-card moment
concepts.additional_info: Avoid prominent face framing in every shot. Keep both people mid-wide, in soft profile, and secondary to the route, the wheelchair, and the evening setting.

shots.scene_description: A heavy-set white-haired American senior husband drives the YS16-1 PLUS from the edge of a driveway into warm sunset light while his wife walks just behind and to the side. Keep both people in a medium-wide profile composition with soft non-identifiable faces, no direct eye contact to camera, and strong c1 and c2 scale cues so the chair feels substantial and the rider feels naturally supported. Leave clean top-corner space for hook overlays like Let Them Chase The Sunset Safely and $599.
shots.camera_movement: slow side-front drift into warm evening light with the couple kept small-to-medium in frame
shots.lighting: golden-hour sunlight with soft bloom and long natural shadows
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide sunset frame, rider and chair prominent but faces secondary, no exact source-home cues
shots.transition_anchor: end with the chair moving smoothly toward the lane
shots.voiceover_en: Let them chase the sunset safely, one more time.
shots.sfx: soft evening ambience and distant birds

shots.scene_description: The husband continues along a quiet tree-lined lane with his right hand on the joystick while his wife walks beside him, matching pace and smiling softly. Keep the rider-chair ratio believable like c1 and c2: fuller body naturally seated in the wide chair, strong wheel size, readable frame, and no toy-like scale. Leave space for UI overlays calling out 22-inch First-Class Seat, 500W Dual Motors, and Smooth Outdoor Confidence.
shots.camera_movement: steady joystick-side front-profile move with soft parallax from trees and sky
shots.lighting: warm low-angle sunset light with realistic contrast and soft edge highlights
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium shot, rider and chair take most of the frame, spouse visible, clean lane and trees
shots.transition_anchor: end with a calm smile and a gentle slowdown
shots.voiceover_en: The wide seat feels secure, the ride feels smooth, and the outdoors feels welcoming again.
shots.key_message: Product proof supports the emotional promise.
shots.sfx: light wheel roll, evening breeze, and soft ambient air

shots.scene_description: The couple come to a gentle stop and look outward toward the sunset rather than at camera. Keep the framing medium-wide with the couple in the lower half of the frame, chair still readable, and ample negative space in the sky for the final trust and offer stack: Now $599 Reg $999, FDA 510(k) Cleared, 30-Day Risk-Free Trial, 14-Day FREE Return Shipping, and PayPal financing from $32.27 per month or as low as 0% APR. The mood should feel calm and anonymous, not face-led or close-portrait.
shots.camera_movement: gentle settle into a locked warm profile hero frame with no direct eye contact
shots.lighting: rich sunset light with polished direct-response finish
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide frame, chair still readable, clean negative space in the sky for trust and offer stack
shots.transition_anchor: final hold for CTA and brand lockup
shots.voiceover_en: Now just five ninety-nine, with risk-free returns, FDA-cleared safety, and financing that makes the choice easier.
shots.key_message: The final beat combines emotion, trust, and purchase ease.
shots.sfx: music swell and soft evening ambience
